title: Nishith Desai Associates International Disputes Head Ashish Kabra moves to Resolüt Partners
description: After 15 years at Nishith Desai Associates, Ashish Kabra has moved to Resolüt Partners as Partner and & Head - International Disputes & Investigations Practice.Kabra is an alumnus of National Law University, Jodhpur. He earned his LL.M. in International Commercial Arbitration from Stockholm University.During his time at NDA, Kabra led the firm's international arbitration practice. He specialises in advising investors on shareholder disputes, internal investigations and director liability
